_comment: Fixture: fallback case — no sleep event found. BB-4 fix: wakeValue is null with confidence=unavailable. The previous estimated_from_lowest heuristic was broken-by-design (recovery nights have nadir pre-bed, not at wake). Null is more honest than a wrong number.
caveat: No sleep event found in body-battery events response for this date. Re-run after device sync or use get_body_battery_events to investigate.
